{{デフォルトソート:のうかく}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|のうかく}} {{translated page|ja|Category:江戸時代の農学|version=61832226}} {{translated page|ja|江戸時代の農学|comment=idk if categories need this template but doing it because I have OCD[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:37, 21 May 2025 (UTC)|2=Category:江戸時代の農学|comment=did a replacement}} [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:江戸時代の農学]] [[ko:Category:에도 시대의 농학]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:江戸時代の農学者]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Arts_and_Crafts_in_the_Edo_Period]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:History of Agronomy in Japan]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q28696569)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
